textByHash.00b4a6dbd440955e826052b8a994bb28e351ed04: Can I help you with anything else?
textByHash.02d272895549f12f5f5921cc541200ba95068bdf: So, are you looking to buy weapons? King Thoros keeps us very well stocked.
textByHash.0e62454ce98e421f2557c39c499958cad31ce5e6: You don't have space for that.
textByHash.0e8a39a1c16b65a439df9a543dbd33f508e83a62: I do, but you need to be on a members world for me to give you the reward. Maybe there is something else I can help you with.
textByHash.291745b77df05d4b5c47a60aa8d664b22919f9d6: I also sell other weapons if you are interested.
textByHash.29d453fcda37e9ca859b9c7f4361e82ac7f22e60: So, are you looking to buy weapons? King Lathas keeps us very well stocked.
textByHash.2d904201458d5b0fb1e0e2b9d6a58b07351edf9b: Um, yes, exotic surface goods... here, have a look at our wares...
textByHash.40c768c255ebde0c6e75529deaa4f1cf9c8ee70b: Good day lass. What can I do for you?
textByHash.47d97f39cd85455ae4e5ba5060001e59c116bd6f: Why yes, here is one of our finest swords.
textByHash.4ee0351c1f112f640eafeff003a299207cd0afe9: We'll carry on as normal with the store. Business as usual!
textByHash.607ebd217a073fabb40830677c6103af9a05d15b: Of course, you left it here and I kept it for you.
textByHash.63bb6f4fbca1fd20ffc0af29e80e7072999cc3d6: Can't say as I've seen him... I'm sure if he's been to Al-Kharid recently someone around here will have though.
textByHash.72995dfb67ad898e713a5c4746e015c7aa5b5d16: I will be able to give you your reward when you have some space for it.
textByHash.7499cd3b046cb4119cc740b74d72ab87006c718e: Hello, bold adventurer! Can I interest you in some swords?
textByHash.7d94db10f263c8ee7de1351036970af77801cae5: Um... wood. It, er, grows on trees?
textByHash.907bee10a5750e11159102773c5c00db4680a9ff: Can I help you at all?
textByHash.948449b6b601630e614265b9031472570db1b18c: I don't trust him, not after he's sent his men round to threaten us.
textByHash.a11b6eefaaedb54f53630951b3f105bc129eb01c: Good day lad. What can I do for you?
textByHash.af82dc632dbcb355ffc804b70180a55dcf87fd2c: Can I interest you in anything?
textByHash.b1e49cdad30026e269812b2416df48e34225dc1f: Did you know, we've had four different thugs come round and threaten us if we don't join them.
textByHash.c855d6365d6025fb9307b0037311e0406c9ccab9: Come back if you need any.
textByHash.d5f87462279168f0a5506600e83d87a16ec96408: Can't say as I've seen him... I'm sure if he's been to Al Kharid recently someone around here will have though.
textByHash.dc73486b18ede87db08b85db90257e92d4b92273: So, do you want to buy anything?
textByHash.ed2266310c5f46c159ea4977cf2595878e6ac3d7: Well, these folks digging up the island need some of your everyday things, so I offered to come along and offer my wares.
textByHash.faca9889b78d02bccb5e8022b15ff386c79ec984: I've had hammers, rakes, swords and even scissors waved at me!
